value.fullName: a. Benefit to LMI Individuals/limited clientele (at least 51% of beneficiaries must be LMI)
value.label: a. Benefit to LMI Individuals/limited clientele (at least 51% of beneficiaries must be LMI)

value.fullName: b. Benefit to LMI households for housing (100% of beneficiaries must be at or below 80% of median family income for City, as determined by HUD, for single family units)
value.label: b. Benefit to LMI households for housing (100% of beneficiaries must be at or below 80% of median family income for City, as determined by HUD, for single family units)

value.fullName: c. Benefit to LMI individuals/jobs creation or retention (at least 51% of jobs must be taken by or made available to LMI persons)
value.label: c. Benefit to LMI individuals/jobs creation or retention (at least 51% of jobs must be taken by or made available to LMI persons)

value.fullName: d. Benefits of services available to all residents in an area that is primarily residential and is located in an eligible LMI census tract(s). (Not applicable to Housing activities)
value.label: d. Benefits of services available to all residents in an area that is primarily residential and is located in an eligible LMI census tract(s). (Not applicable to Housing activities)

value.fullName: e. Prevent or eliminate slum and blight on an area basis
value.label: e. Prevent or eliminate slum and blight on an area basis

value.fullName: f. Prevent or eliminate slum and blight on a spot basis (applicable only for public facilities and improvements)
value.label: f. Prevent or eliminate slum and blight on a spot basis (applicable only for public facilities and improvements)

value.fullName: h. Urgent Need (applicable only for Tornado disaster recovery)
value.label: h. Urgent Need (applicable only for Tornado disaster recovery)
